name: ieee-sp-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy (IEEE S&P, 'Oakland') submissions: venue fit, the two-cycle HotCRP submission year, early reject and interactive rebuttal, the Revise pathway, ethics and responsible disclosure, artifact badges, and IEEE camera-ready. Grounded in the S&P 2027 CFP and cycle pages checked on 2026-07-08.
